plan.failureSummary: The automated step failed because it couldn't find the 'Last Name' input field, which appears to have been replaced by a 'Your Name' field in the current UI.
observedIndicators: UI structure change detected: 'Last Name' field is missing, 'Your Name' field is present in failure screenshot
History shows frequent alternating failures/successes, suggesting a dynamic or A/B tested UI

remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu/page.ai cache for this test and re-run. This will force the agent to re-analyze the page and identify the new 'Your Name' field instead of looking for the stale 'Last Name' field.

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling deterministic mode for this dynamic test.
remediationSteps.details: If this survey is intentionally 'unstable' (as suggested by the filename and history), consider disabling DETERMINISTIC mode or using a shorter cache TTL for this specific test to allow it to adapt to frequent UI changes automatically.

plan.notes: The failure is a classic stale cache issue in deterministic mode. Comparison between the failure screenshot and the cached tool parameters shows a mismatch: the cache expects a 'Last Name' field (selector [data-testid='input-lastname']), but the live page currently displays 'Your Name'. Because the page.ai instruction is semantically flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache and retrying will allow the agent to adapt to the new form structure.
